metadata.description: 作用域链: Variable lookup traverses up the scope chain. `let` and `const` define block-level scope. Closures retain references to external variables. Here's a brief Python code example to illustrate these concepts: ```python def outer_function(): x = 10 # This is in the outer function's scope def inner_function(): print(x) # Accessing the variable from the outer scope inner_function() # This will print 10 outer_function() ``` In this example, `inner_function` has access to the variable `x` defined in the `outer_function`, demonstrating how closures retain references to external variables. Note that Python uses lexical scoping, which is similar to block-level scope with `let` and `const` in JavaScript.

data_pointers.title: 作用域链
data_pointers.content_preview: 作用域链: Variable lookup traverses up the scope chain. `let` and `const` define block-level scope. Closures retain references to external variables. Here's a brief Python code example to illustrate these concepts: ```python def outer_function(): x = 10 # This is in the outer function's scope def inner_function(): print(x) # Accessing the variable from the outer scope inner_function() # This will print 10 outer_function() ``` In this example, `inner_function` has access to the variable `x` defined in the `outer_function`, demonstrating how closures retain references to external variables. Note that Python uses lexical scoping, which is similar to block-level scope with `let` and `const` in JavaScript.

common_pitfalls: 在循环中使用 var 声明变量并创建闭包时，所有闭包共享同一个变量，导致最终值相同；应使用 let 或立即执行函数表达式。
错误地认为作用域链在运行时动态改变，实际上它基于函数定义时的词法环境，导致某些变量意外被保留。
在异步回调中访问循环变量时，由于作用域链的延迟绑定，可能得到预期之外的值，需使用闭包或 let 解决。
